archetype: Jewel & Luxury combined with Organic/Earthy warmth

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10

hero.alignment: text-center or left-aligned with abstract image

cards.style: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-2xl hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#ff6a00] hover:bg-[#ff8840] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors

contact_form.honeypot: Hidden input field for spam protection

images.description: Abstract dark premium background with warm orange glow for Hero section
Abstract device and security representation for Services section
Abstract warm friendly AI nodes for AI Help section
Abstract 3D shapes representing trust and structure for Boundaries/How it Works section

instructions_to_main_agent: Import Manrope and Work Sans from Google Fonts in index.html.
Build a modern React landing page using Tailwind CSS and Lucide React icons.
Use Manrope for headings and Work Sans for body text. Do not use Inter for headings.
No visible email addresses or phone numbers. Replace with a Netlify-ready contact form that includes a hidden honeypot field.
Ensure 'No fix, no fee', €30 call-out, and Pensioner discount are highlighted in the Pricing section.
Use subtle framer-motion animations (fade-in, slide-up) for section entrances. No flashy particles.
Implement a sticky navigation with 'backdrop-blur-xl' and a primary CTA button.
Create a specific section delineating 'Home Users' vs 'Small Businesses' based on the core purpose.
Include an 'AI Help' section using the provided AI abstract image, framing AI help as practical and beginner-friendly.
Include a 'Boundaries' section clearly listing what is NOT covered.
Use Shadcn UI Accordion for the FAQ section.
Every interactive element must have a 'data-testid' attribute.
Link to jaredtalbot.com in the minimal footer.
